channel.title: swamp on Magistr and Maps
channel.description: Recent content in swamp on Magistr and Maps

item.title: Running macOS Tiger on QEMU: A Technical Post-Mortem
item.description: Disclaimer: The following text is an AI-generated log and summary of a 10-hour attempt by claude-code and Swamp to virtualize macOS Tiger 10.4. I wanted to run macOS Tiger 10.

item.title: The Sight of Systems
item.description: I’ll never forget that feeling—ingesting millions of metrics into a tool like Grafana or Honeycomb for the first time. Before that, I was blind. I was guessing.
